---
name: Benchmark report / correction
about: Submit or correct a Vestrix accuracy/benchmark result
title: "[BENCHMARK] "
labels: benchmark
assignees: ''
---

**Model version / config hash**

**Dataset used** (name, source, link if public)

**Methodology**
Train/test split strategy, cross-validation approach, whether leave-one-room-out / leave-one-device-out was used.

**Results**
False-positive rate, false-negative rate, confusion matrix, per-environment breakdown.

**Reproduction**
Link to the script/notebook used to generate these numbers. Per `CONTRIBUTING.md`, benchmark numbers must be reproducible, not hand-reported.

**Known limitations of this run**
